title: vibemix Ear-Test Log
description: Structured log entry written by the Phase 29 debrief window when Kaan signs off on a DJ session for the v3.0 hybrid hallucination gate. Consumed by scripts/release/check_ear_test.sh (Plan 42-03) and scripts/release/check_gate.sh (Plan 42-04). See eval/EAR-TEST-PROTOCOL.md for the protocol that produced this shape.

session_id.description: Stable session identifier. Same id appears in the recording session_dir name.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp marking session start.

duration_s.description: Session duration in seconds. Schema-level 30 min minimum (1800 s) per Plan 42-03 D-GATE-05.

genre.description: Genre tag. The ≥ 2 genres in 14d invariant in check_ear_test.sh counts distinct values across this field.

felt_slop.description: true = generic AI noise, not grounded in actual mix.

felt_scripted.description: true = reaction felt pre-canned, not responsive to the specific moment.

felt_late.description: true = reaction landed >= 3s after trigger, breaking flow.

felt_generic.description: true = reaction could apply to any track in any set.

free_form.description: Free-form notes from the debrief textarea. May be empty.

signed_by.description: Signing identity. v3.0 is single-DJ (Kaan-only); cross-DJ sign-off deferred to v3.x per Plan 42 CONTEXT.

signed_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of sign-off submit.
